decisions.decision: Discard duplicate changes in main working tree before each worktree merge
decisions.rationale: Wave 1 executor wrote to both the worktree AND main tree (abac.rs). Must run git checkout -- <file> before merging worktree branch to avoid 'overwritten by merge' error

Pre-existing integration test compile errors in dlp-server (ring/ppv_lite86 crate format, mode_end_to_end import issues) are unrelated to phase 37. Use cargo test -p dlp-server --lib for reliable unit test coverage
